## Checklist

- [ ] I did not add copyrighted PDFs, OCR dumps, or long copied passages.
- [ ] New or changed entries include status metadata.
- [ ] Source references use metadata rather than copied source text.
- [ ] Related entries are listed when relevant.
- [ ] I updated docs or schemas if needed.
